steps.title: Translate 'at most' to inequality notation
steps.content: The phrase at most 14 describes a maximum value—the number of places cannot exceed 14. In mathematics, at most is represented by $\le$ (less than or equal to).

steps.title: Set up the inequality
steps.content:
The total number of places cleaned is $f + h$ (offices plus homes). Since this total can be at most 14:
$$f + h \le 14$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
